info.title: HJTPX API Documentation
info.description: Complete API documentation for HJTPX application

NotFound.description: Not Found - Resource does not exist

get.description: Returns the API specification in JSON format
Returns the API specification in YAML format
Returns a list of all saved API versions

post.description: Save the current API specification as a new version

get.description: Returns the OpenAPI specification for a specific version

200.description: API specification for the requested version

get.description: Returns the Swagger UI for a specific API version

get.description: Compare two API versions and return the differences
Returns statistics about API documentation usage
Returns statistics for a specific endpoint
Returns basic health status of the API service
Returns detailed health status including database, Redis, cache, memory and CPU
Returns database connection pool health status

503.description: Pool is unhealthy or database not available

post.description: Reset all database pool statistics counters

get.description: Retrieve a list of all users (Admin only)
